/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bridge.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bridge.dir/src/bagsimulator/sim_calib_bridge.cpp.o -o bridge   -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib  -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/assimp/lib  -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/freetype/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib:/home/rodrigo/Libraries/assimp/lib:/home/rodrigo/Libraries/freetype/lib:/home/rodrigo/Libraries/boost1.88/lib /home/rodrigo/Libraries/boost1.88/lib/libboost_thread.so.1.88.0 /home/rodrigo/Libraries/yaml_cpp/lib64/libyaml-cpp.a
